business_ideas.idea: Study hall virtual community (StudyVerse): synchronized music, to-do lists, camera, peer pressure for studying
B2B media newsletters for specific industries with premium sponsorship and webinar partnerships
Aunt Flow: menstrual product dispensers for schools with design-forward, non-clinical aesthetics
LinkedIn content strategy via repurposing old tweets (showing that niche content thrives on boring platforms)
Daily deal site reinvention (Mediocre Corporation model): niche daily deals with personality-driven copy
SlideShare reinvention: monetize 100M+ monthly visits via B2B advertising and premium features

predictions.text: Window closing on B2B media opportunity as more entrepreneurs enter space post-Industry Dive $500M exit
Aunt Flow will reach 30-50M revenue through school adoption and mandates in CA, CO, MI
SlideShare could generate 9-figure revenue annually with basic monetization if acquired and optimized
B2B media newsletter businesses are 10x harder to build now than 10 years ago due to competitive crowding
